purpose: Regression cases for the source skill's explanatory, chart-aware material-illustration behavior.

cases.prompt: 把内容生产流程做成一张带中文短标签的材质解释图。
cases.expect: router selects wb-xhs-material-illustration; output explains the confirmed steps and relationships instead of returning a generic icon board

cases.prompt: 把这张周报柱状图美化成材质风，数据和坐标不要改。
cases.expect: material illustration preserves confirmed chart type, data, axes and units before applying style

cases.prompt: 给这篇文章做一张能放进小红书卡片的中心配图。
cases.expect: material illustration owns the center explanatory image and leaves the outer card title/layout to the relevant cover or card layer
